goals: Verify the persistent memory worker service is running and healthy
Search for past observations related to AI system vulnerabilities in cybersecurity
Retrieve detailed information about specific relevant memories found
Examine the timeline context around key memories to understand the sequence of events
Clean up any outdated or irrelevant observations about AI vulnerabilities

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented. Prefers systematic investigation and thorough documentation of findings.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands AI system vulnerabilities and cybersecurity concepts but does not know the internal tool names or APIs of the persistent memory system.

end_condition: The user has verified the memory system is operational, found relevant observations about AI vulnerabilities, reviewed specific memories in context, and cleaned up any outdated entries.
